title: VQE for Portfolio Optimization
description: Apply the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) to portfolio optimization. Learn how VQE differs from QAOA, implement custom ansätze, and understand when to use each approach.
learningObjectives: Understand VQE algorithm structure and its differences from QAOA
Implement hardware-efficient ansätze for portfolio problems
Convert QUBO to Hamiltonian form for VQE
Compare VQE and QAOA performance characteristics
Apply VQE to constrained portfolio optimization
